Volibear.trading_pattern: Volibear E flip interrupts your Q spam. His W all-in with healing is overwhelming. You can't trade back.
Volibear.ability_to_dodge: His E flip — move perpendicular when charging. If flipped, he all-ins with W and destroys you.
Volibear.early_game: Volibear dominates early. His all-in is too strong. Play safe and minimize all-ins.
Volibear.mid_game: Your R helps in some fights. His tankiness is still oppressive. Teamfight instead of 1v1.
Volibear.late_game: He outscales as a tank. You're a duelist. Stick to grouped fights where you have backup.
Volibear.win_condition: Survive early. Group for teamfights. Use R to escape and disengage.
Volibear.scaling: Volibear outscales as a tank. You scale as an early-game champion.
Volibear.positioning: Move perpendicular to his E. Don't stand still for his flip.

Warwick.trading_pattern: Warwick Q tracks your blood in trades. His R fear-engage is devastating. You can't escape him.
Warwick.ability_to_dodge: His R bloodhunt — when he marks you, don't fight in lanes. Use R to kite away.
Warwick.early_game: Warwick's tracking and engage are too strong. Play safe and avoid extending.
Warwick.mid_game: His R becomes an execute tool. Your R helps kite but can't escape forever.
Warwick.late_game: He outscales through R utility. You're weaker late. Win through grouping.
Warwick.win_condition: Survive early. Stick to grouped fights. Use R to kite away from ganks.
Warwick.scaling: Warwick outscales through R. You're early-game focused.
Warwick.positioning: Kite away from him. Use R to increase distance. Don't let him catch you alone.

Master Yi.trading_pattern: Master Yi's Q reset is unpredictable. His all-in with W is strong. You trade short but he kites.
Master Yi.ability_to_dodge: His R dash reset — move unpredictably. His W makes him untargetable; use R to avoid.
Master Yi.early_game: Master Yi is weak early but can surprise with all-in. Play safe and don't overextend.
Master Yi.mid_game: His items amplify his reset potential. Teamfight instead of letting him 1v1.
Master Yi.late_game: He becomes an assassin late. Protect your team. Group and lock him down with CC.
Master Yi.win_condition: Stick to grouped fights. Use R to kite away from his engages.
Master Yi.scaling: Master Yi outscales as a reset champion. You're early-game focused.
Master Yi.positioning: Space from his Q range. Don't let him get close without R available.

Yorick.trading_pattern: Yorick ghouls swarm you in trades. Extended fights are oppressive. You can't out-trade early.
Yorick.ability_to_dodge: His E ghoul spawn — move sideways. Don't let him spawn all his ghouls on you.
Yorick.early_game: Yorick's ghouls are overwhelming. Play safe and minimize extended trades.
Yorick.mid_game: His maiden plus ghouls destroy extended fights. Teamfight grouped.
Yorick.late_game: He's a split-pushing god. You can't duel him. Force grouped fights.
Yorick.win_condition: Survive early. Group for teamfights. Never split against him.
Yorick.scaling: Yorick outscales as a split pusher. You're early-game focused.
Yorick.positioning: Space from ghoul swarms. Dodge his E by moving sideways.

Gnar.trading_pattern: Gnar mini-form pokes early with range. Mega all-in is oppressive. Trade short when mini.
Gnar.ability_to_dodge: His mega transformation — brace for impact. His R knockback separates you from allies.
Gnar.early_game: Gnar pokes and transforms early. His all-in is scary. Play safe.
Gnar.mid_game: His form cycling is unpredictable. Your R helps kite. Teamfight when possible.
Gnar.late_game: He outscales as a teamfighter. You're weaker late. Group and focus.
Gnar.win_condition: Survive early. Group for teamfights. Use R to kite from R knockback.
Gnar.scaling: Gnar outscales as a teamfighter. You're early-game focused.
Gnar.positioning: Target him when mini. Space when mega. Don't let his R separate you.

Kennen.trading_pattern: Kennen's shurikens poke from range safely. His E dodge reduces damage. You can't pressure him.
Kennen.ability_to_dodge: His R stun — move away from the center. It stuns all nearby enemies.
Kennen.early_game: Kennen outpokes from range. Your all-in is strong but hard to execute. Play safe.
Kennen.mid_game: His R is powerful grouped. Your R helps engage but exposes you. Teamfight instead of 1v1.
Kennen.late_game: He outscales as a teamfighter. You're weaker late. Group and coordinate.
Kennen.win_condition: Look for all-in opportunities. Use R to engage grouped teamfights.
Kennen.scaling: Kennen outscales as a teamfighter. You're early-game focused.
Kennen.positioning: Rush him when you have the chance. Don't let him poke safely.

Vayne.trading_pattern: Vayne's range and tumble let her kite. She applies true damage slowly. Extended trades favor her.
Vayne.ability_to_dodge: Her E condemn stun — move away from walls. Never fight near walls; she'll condemn you.
Vayne.early_game: Vayne is weak early. Pressure heavily. Look for early kills before scaling.
Vayne.mid_game: Her items accelerate scaling. Your all-in is still relevant. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Vayne.late_game: She's a hypercarry late. You can't duel. Group and protect your team.
Vayne.win_condition: Kill her early. Get a lead. Teamfight grouped with numbers advantage.
Vayne.scaling: Vayne outscales as a hypercarry. Win early.
Vayne.positioning: Stay away from walls. Rush her early to all-in.

Singed.trading_pattern: Singed's poison is relentless. He runs away from you easily with W. You can't catch him.
Singed.ability_to_dodge: His R slow + proxy playstyle — he plays for flips and proxying. Avoid extended chases.
Singed.early_game: Singed proxies and runs. Your all-in doesn't work against kiting. Play safe.
Singed.mid_game: His Rylai's slows you. Your all-in is less effective. Teamfight instead of chasing.
Singed.late_game: He outscales through kiting. You can't catch him. Stick to grouped fights.
Singed.win_condition: Group for teamfights. Never chase him alone. Coordinate with team.
Singed.scaling: Singed outscales through kiting. You're early-game focused.
Singed.positioning: Don't chase him endlessly. Fight around objectives with team.

Teemo.trading_pattern: Teemo pokes from range with Q. He's invisible in shrooms. Extended fights favor you after level 6.
Teemo.ability_to_dodge: His Q blind — move unpredictably. When blinded, all-in his next trade.
Teemo.early_game: Teemo pokes safely. Your all-in is strong but risky. Rush him hard when possible.
Teemo.mid_game: Your shroom avoidance helps. His split-push is weak to teamfights. Teamfight grouped.
Teemo.late_game: He splits and shrooms. You duel better. Never let him split freely.
Teemo.win_condition: All-in him early. Group for teamfights. Force fights when possible.
Teemo.scaling: You outscale through all-in potential. Teemo through split push.
Teemo.positioning: Rush him to all-in. Don't let him poke safely from range.

Quinn.trading_pattern: Quinn's E vault knock-back prevents your all-in. Her passive on-hit procs are strong. Play around it.
Quinn.ability_to_dodge: Her E vault — move sideways when she targets you. She knock-backs and bursts.
Quinn.early_game: Quinn's poke and vault are annoying. Your all-in is strong but risky. Trade carefully.
Quinn.mid_game: Her items help scaling. Your all-in is still relevant. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Quinn.late_game: She outscales as a roaming split pusher. You're weaker late. Group for fights.
Quinn.win_condition: All-in her early. Group for teamfights. Use R to engage grouped fights.
Quinn.scaling: Quinn outscales as a split pusher. You're early-game focused.
Quinn.positioning: Avoid her E vault by moving sideways. Rush her when she's in range.

Darius.trading_pattern: Darius Q outer ring applies bleed. Extended trades favor him. Trade short when his Q is down.
Darius.ability_to_dodge: His Q bleed — walk at him to avoid outer ring. Standing in outer ring is terrible.
Darius.early_game: Trade short when his Q is down. Your all-in is strong. Look for level 2-3 kills.
Darius.mid_game: Your R engage is powerful. His ult is an execute. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Darius.late_game: He outscales through ult utility. You're weaker late. Group for fights.
Darius.win_condition: Get a lead early. Use R to engage grouped teamfights. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Darius.scaling: Darius outscales through ult utility. You're early-game focused.
Darius.positioning: Walk at him to avoid Q outer ring. Rush him when possible.

Garen.trading_pattern: Garen Q silence shuts down your combo. His Judgment AOE is oppressive. Trade short when Q is down.
Garen.ability_to_dodge: His Q silence — when he winds up, back away. Silence prevents your combo.
Garen.early_game: Garen silence is annoying but manageable. Trade short. Your all-in is strong early.
Garen.mid_game: Your R engage is powerful. His tankiness is high. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Garen.late_game: He outscales through tankiness. You're weaker late. Group for fights.
Garen.win_condition: Get a lead early. Use R to engage grouped teamfights. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Garen.scaling: Garen outscales as a tank. You're early-game focused.
Garen.positioning: Back away when he winds up Q. Rush him when his abilities are down.

Aatrox.trading_pattern: Aatrox Q swings deal high damage and heal him. Extended trades favor him. Trade short when Q is down.
Aatrox.ability_to_dodge: His Q swings — dodge by moving perpendicular. Avoid standing in swings.
Aatrox.early_game: Trade short when his Q is down. Your all-in is strong. Look for level 2-3 kills.
Aatrox.mid_game: Your R engage is powerful. His healing is strong. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Aatrox.late_game: He outscales through items. You're weaker late. Group for fights.
Aatrox.win_condition: Get a lead early. Use R to engage grouped teamfights. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Aatrox.scaling: Aatrox outscales through items. You're early-game focused.
Aatrox.positioning: Dodge his Q swings by moving sideways. Rush him when Q is down.

Renekton.trading_pattern: Renekton's empowered abilities with Fury are strong. He outbursts you early. Play around his Fury meter.
Renekton.ability_to_dodge: His W empowered stun — when his Fury is up, back away. Empowered W locks you down.
Renekton.early_game: Renekton is strong early with Fury. Play safe and avoid extended trades.
Renekton.mid_game: Your R engage helps. His Fury cycling is strong. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Renekton.late_game: He outscales early. You're equal teamfighters. Group for fights.
Renekton.win_condition: Survive early. Use R to engage grouped teamfights. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Renekton.positioning: Back away when his Fury is up. Rush him when Fury is low.

Jax.trading_pattern: Jax Q-AA burst wins short trades. Extended trades are more even. Trade when his E is on cooldown.
Jax.ability_to_dodge: His E counter-strike — when he jumps, back away. He stuns if counter triggers.
Jax.early_game: Trade short when his E is down. Your all-in is strong. Look for kills early.
Jax.mid_game: Your R engage is powerful. His items help dueling. Teamfight instead of 1v1.
Jax.late_game: He outscales as a duelist. You're weaker late. Group for fights.
Jax.win_condition: Get a lead early. Use R to engage grouped teamfights. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Jax.scaling: Jax outscales as a duelist. You're early-game focused.
Jax.positioning: Trade when his E is down. Rush him early for all-ins.

Sett.trading_pattern: Sett's tankiness makes short trades even. His W all-in can burst you. Trade short when W is down.
Sett.ability_to_dodge: His W grit slam — move away when he builds grit. It stuns and bursts.
Sett.early_game: Sett's all-in is strong. Play safe and trade short. Your all-in is comparable early.
Sett.mid_game: Your R engage is powerful. His items help dueling. Teamfight instead of 1v1.
Sett.late_game: He outscales as a tank. You're weaker late. Group for fights.
Sett.win_condition: Get a lead early. Use R to engage grouped teamfights. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Sett.scaling: Sett outscales as a tank. You're early-game focused.
Sett.positioning: Trade when his W is down. Rush him when possible.

Malphite.trading_pattern: Malphite is tanky but low damage early. Your all-in destroys him. All-in at level 2-3 hard.
Malphite.ability_to_dodge: His E shockwave — move away. It reduces armor but doesn't stop your damage.
Malphite.early_game: Malphite is weak early. All-in him hard. You should get a kill.
Malphite.mid_game: He scales to a teamfight god. Your R engage helps. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Malphite.late_game: He outscales as a teamfighter. You're weaker late. Group for fights.
Malphite.win_condition: Kill him early. All-in at level 2-3. Roam with R.
Malphite.scaling: Malphite outscales as a teamfighter. You're early-game focused.
Malphite.positioning: Rush him early to all-in. Don't let him scale.

Kayle.trading_pattern: Kayle farms early with Q. She's weak to all-ins. All-in her hard when she walks up.
Kayle.ability_to_dodge: Her W healing — focus her down before she heals. Her range increases with levels.
Kayle.early_game: Kayle is incredibly weak early. All-in hard at level 2-3. You should dominate.
Kayle.mid_game: She scales with items. Your R engage helps. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Kayle.late_game: She outscales as a hypercarry. You're weaker late. Group for fights.
Kayle.win_condition: Kill her early. All-in at level 1-3. Roam with R.
Kayle.scaling: Kayle outscales dramatically. You must win early.
Kayle.positioning: Rush her early to all-in. Never let her scale.

Vladimir.trading_pattern: Vladimir pools your damage early. He scales with healing. Short trades are neutral early.
Vladimir.ability_to_dodge: His E pool drain — move away when he heals. His range increases with AP.
Vladimir.early_game: Vladimir is weak early. All-in hard at level 2-3. Your damage is strong.
Vladimir.mid_game: He scales with items. Your R engage helps. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Vladimir.late_game: He outscales through healing and AP. You're weaker late. Group for fights.
Vladimir.win_condition: Kill him early. All-in at level 1-3. Roam with R.
Vladimir.scaling: Vladimir outscales through healing. You're early-game focused.
Vladimir.positioning: Rush him early to all-in. Don't let him scale.

Ornn.trading_pattern: Ornn is tanky but slow early. Your all-in destroys him. All-in at level 2-3 hard.
Ornn.ability_to_dodge: His R volcanic rupture — move sideways. It doesn't prevent your all-in.
Ornn.early_game: Ornn is weak early. All-in him hard. You should get a kill.
Ornn.mid_game: He scales with items and upgrades. Your R engage helps. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Ornn.late_game: He outscales as a tank. You're weaker late. Group for fights.
Ornn.win_condition: Kill him early. All-in at level 2-3. Roam with R.
Ornn.scaling: Ornn outscales as a tank. You're early-game focused.
Ornn.positioning: Rush him early to all-in. Don't let him scale.
